data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. Let me run the integration tests filtered by category.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true` in Directory.Build.props). The tests are categorized with `[TestCategory("Integration")]` and `[TestCategory("Unit")]`.

To run only integration tests, I need to filter by the "Integration" category. With the new Microsoft Testing Platform and `dotnet test`, I can use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-d5cb99b7c22145698b1842989f7dd826 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MSTest category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter
